title: Expansion Continues With Ease
subtitle: An affirmation for holding growth as a natural, generous, and aligned continuation of what has already been built
excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 83 theme of a 12-week money programme. The statement names expansion not as ambition or pressure but as a natural next step that carries generosity forward.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 83 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

practice.whenToUse: Use on days when growth feels optional or tiring, as a reset to the idea that expansion can be light and that giving rises with it.

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 83 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 83: commit to continued growth and giving. The statement holds growth as something that carries generosity with it, not a demand to do more.
Say it three times in the morning, hand on heart. Let it settle before the day begins.
I allow expansion to continue with ease, generosity, and alignment.
Adapted from the Day 83 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
